feature.name: Command line option parsing and invocation
feature.description: Extract Click's core command, option, argument, type conversion, and testing runner behavior.
included_behaviors: decorate functions as commands and groups
parse options, flags, choices, defaults, integer ranges, and positional arguments
invoke commands through CliRunner and capture output, exit code, and exceptions
support nested groups and context object passing
render useful usage/error output for invalid options and bad values
excluded_behaviors: terminal color/style platform integrations beyond basic echo

entanglement.description: CLI behavior is coupled to command decorators, context stacks, parameter parsing, terminal output, and testing runner state.

output.import: import featurelifted as click; from featurelifted.testing import CliRunner
